codeReview.summary: Reviewed the original failing commit d569e910dfa8111d4dc428b2ff51e2b4b42c89a7 and the fix commit 77e82f11509b95fae63a3a15f88b3497e28869ed. The fix addresses both prior blocking issues: projected-source scraping is now explicitly scoped to the requested date by skipping current-day-only RotoGrinders/RotoBaller sources when `game_date` does not match the current Eastern Time game date (`src/clients/lineup_client.py:426-438`), and the RotoBaller fallback now uses an `HTMLParser`-based parser with defensive error handling plus direct success/fallback coverage in `tests/test_lineup_client.py:265-276`, `:399-433`, `:436-468`, and `:471-507`.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The fix handoff reports a new repo-local stash, `worker-ba06611d isolate unrelated data_builder WIP`, but `.factory/library/workspace-state.md` does not record that stash entry. Future workers trying to recover or understand isolated local WIP would miss it.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff discoveredIssues in C:\Users\bills\.factory\missions\83c0c194-72d1-4821-8b08-68a3497c3590\handoffs\2026-03-19T16-21-56-883Z__fix-t7-lineup-date-scoping__ba06611d-576a-4a2d-ad2e-8e02478f60c5.json:55-59 records the stash, while C:\Users\bills\Documents\Personal Projects\MLBPrediction2026\.factory\library\workspace-state.md:16-20 lists other data_builder-related stashes but not the `worker-ba06611d` entry.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Startup guidance remains mismatched with the actual Windows workflow. The worker again had to deviate from the init/startup path because `bash .factory/init.sh` could not resolve `pip`, even though the repo's shared environment notes and services manifest already prescribe direct `.venv\Scripts\python.exe` commands on Windows.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: The fix handoff marks `followedProcedure: false` and documents the Windows init deviation in C:\Users\bills\.factory\missions\83c0c194-72d1-4821-8b08-68a3497c3590\handoffs\2026-03-19T16-21-56-883Z__fix-t7-lineup-date-scoping__ba06611d-576a-4a2d-ad2e-8e02478f60c5.json:62-72. The repo already documents the workaround in C:\Users\bills\Documents\Personal Projects\MLBPrediction2026\.factory\library\environment.md:57-61 and exposes Windows-native commands in C:\Users\bills\Documents\Personal Projects\MLBPrediction2026\.factory\services.yaml:5-14.

summary: Pass. The fix adequately resolves the original review's two blocking issues by preventing current-day projected pages from contaminating non-matching requested dates and by hardening plus directly testing the RotoBaller fallback path. I also recorded two shared-state observations: the new local stash was not added to workspace-state, and the Windows startup guidance remains inconsistent with the documented repo workaround.
